rewritten_requirements: The system shall keep the rate in a waiting state until the start date arrives.
The system shall activate the rate once the current date equals or surpasses its start date.
The system shall maintain the rate's active state until the end of its validity period.
The system shall mark the rate as expired once the finish date is reached.
The system shall remove or archive the rate after one year from its expiration date.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When a new rate is created, it remains in a waiting phase until its start date is reached.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'When a new rate is created, it is not immediately applied. Instead, it remains in a waiting phase until its start date is reached.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the current date reaches or passes the defined start date, the rate becomes active and can be used by the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'Once the current date reaches or passes the defined start date, the rate becomes active and can be used by the system.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The rate remains active until its validity period ends.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'The rate continues to remain active until its validity period ends.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the finish date is reached, the rate is no longer valid and is considered expired.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'When the finish date is reached, the rate is no longer valid and is considered expired.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After a certain period of time, such as one year from its expiration, the system automatically removes or archives the rate.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'After a certain period of time, such as one year from its expiration, the system automatically removes or archives the rate so that outdated information does not remain in use.'
